name: Compiler Theory
description: The art of translating high-level code to machine instructions.

body.raw: Uncover the magic behind compilers. Learn about lexical analysis, parsing, semantic analysis, code generation, and optimization techniques that transform source code into executable programs.
body.html: Uncover the magic behind compilers. Learn about lexical analysis, parsing, semantic analysis, code generation, and optimization techniques that transform source code into executable programs.
